parameters: Chiwa...I'm so, so sorry that this is happening to you.
Our town, it's...gone.
Everything we had...
But don't worry, Chiwa. We'll get through this, okay?
Right...Chiwa.
Me, you and Neon are going to Caesitia tommorrow night.
Alayna and Angie are coming soon after.
- Valo
November 11th, 1017:
Chiwa's sick again, I feel like we're having to care
for her an awful lot lately.
Maybe she's just faking it...no. That can't be it.
I need to trust her more, it must be the change
in location.
I must admit, it's not the nicest place in the world.
The streets are crowded with people, it's nothing
like the town we grew up in.
Still, I think we can get used to this. People deal
with changes all the time, it's nothing new.
Perhaps I should go to bed, the morning isn't going
to delay for my sake.
- Valo
November 12th, 1017:
So Chiwa's feeling fine again. That was quick.
I don't really have anything else to say,
I just wanted to mention this.
November 20th, 1017:
Of all the terrible things that could have happened,
Chiwa's gone missing.
I mean, I'm sure she's just wandering around somewhere,
but I can't shake the feeling that she's in danger
somehow.
Well, Alayna says we should just stay put and wait for
her. But...what if she IS lost.
What if we'll never see her again?
I'm going looking for her, I don't care what Alayna
thinks.
- Valo
December 2nd, 1017:
I feel this weird aura today, like something is good,
but also wrong.
Like...something special is happening today.
Nah!
But I shouldn't be happy today.
Chiwa's still missing and there's been no progress
at all.
We want to send a search party out for her but I
dunno how to ask anyone about it.
There's already four of us anyway.
We'll find her eventually.
- Valo
